[[Undoing the Copernican Revolution]] means enhancing sensory salience so people can [[Phenomenal knowing|phenomenally know]] better<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gW6djxNs270</ref>

== References ==

[[Category:Phenomenal knowledge]]
[[sn:Undoing the Copernican Revolution]][[Category:Transhumanism]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
